title: IT Security Policy
subtitle: Protecting Your Digital Assets
introduction: QuikkRed is committed to maintaining the highest standards of information security to protect customer data and ensure the integrity of our digital lending platform.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection Measures
dataProtection.description: We implement industry-leading security measures to protect your personal and financial information.
items: 256-bit SSL encryption for all data transmissions
Regular security audits and penetration testing
Data encryption at rest and in transit

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.description: Strict access controls ensure that only authorized personnel can access sensitive information.
items: Regular access reviews and audit trails

incidentResponse.title: Incident Response
incidentResponse.description: We have a comprehensive incident response plan to quickly address any security breaches.
items: Customer notification within 72 hours of a breach
Regular incident response drills and updates

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.description: Our IT security practices comply with all relevant regulations and standards.

customerResponsibilities.title: Customer Responsibilities
customerResponsibilities.description: Help us keep your account secure by following these best practices:

reportingIncidents.title: Reporting Security Incidents
reportingIncidents.description: If you notice any suspicious activity or security concerns, please report immediately to:

footerNote: This policy is reviewed and updated annually to ensure continued effectiveness.
